name: codexstar69-bug-hunter
description: Adversarial AI bug hunter with auto-fix skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, Kiro CLI, Opencode, Pi Coding Agent, and more. Multi-agent pipeline finds security vulnerabilities, logic errors, and runtime bugs — then fixes them autonomously on a safe branch.
